response.justification: Candidate meets the 15-year technical experience floor with solid full-stack engineering credentials and recent exposure to AI infrastructure (MCP frameworks at re:cinq). However, the strategic AI expertise required for a director-level role is minimal and very recent—starting only 4 months ago. No Master's/PhD in AI, no recognized AI thought leadership, and no evidence of building core AI products or advising enterprise customers on AI strategy.
strengths: Meets 15+ years continuous software engineering experience with demonstrated growth across full-stack, embedded, and infrastructure domains
Recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks shows emerging engagement with cutting-edge AI tooling
Proven ability to lead and inspire technical communities through open-source projects (GISCollective), workshops, and conference talks
concerns: AI expertise is newly acquired (4 months into current role) with no prior strategic AI product or platform development in career history
Lacks Master's/PhD in AI-related field and shows no recognized expertise or published thought leadership in AI strategy
Frequent job transitions with current role too recent to assess actual impact; no evidence of advising enterprise customers on cloud/AI adoption at strategic level
